notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Nolan Schanuel batting, Zach Neto picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Jacob Wilson.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz walks. Lawrence Butler scores. Henry Bolte to 3rd. Zack Gelof to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Lawrence Butler to 3rd. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Lawrence Butler to 3rd. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Lawrence Butler to 3rd. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas strikes out swinging, catcher Logan O'Hoppe to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy homers (4) on a fly ball to center field. Lawrence Butler scores.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Tyler Soderstrom scores.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Heineman challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Lawrence Butler steals (5) 3rd base. Henry Bolte steals (7) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy flies out to right fielder Jo Adell.
